stories.title: U.S. government will decide who gets to use GPT-5.6
stories.summary: The US government is implementing a tiered access system for frontier AI models, requiring vetting before users can access OpenAI's GPT-5.6. This marks a new era of government-managed AI model releases.

stories.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model from OpenAI
stories.summary: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 Sol with new 'ultra' mode using subagents, setting new benchmarks in coding, biology, and cybersecurity. Available in three tiers (Sol, Terra, Luna) with pricing from $1-$30 per 1M tokens.

stories.title: U.S. allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI to 'trusted' US organizations
stories.summary: The US government partially lifts restrictions on Anthropic's Claude Mythos 5 model, releasing it to 100+ vetted institutions after a two-week security review. This establishes a foundational framework for US AI regulation.

stories.title: DeepSeek open-sources inference optimizations with 60-85% faster generation
stories.summary: DeepSeek releases DSpark, an open-source inference optimization framework achieving 60-85% faster token generation. The paper details novel approaches to speculative decoding and memory-efficient serving.

stories.title: Qualcomm acquiring Tenstorrent for $8-10B to challenge NVIDIA in AI chips
stories.summary: Qualcomm is acquiring AI chip startup Tenstorrent for $8-10 billion, betting on open RISC-V architecture to challenge NVIDIA and AMD's dominance in AI hardware. The deal signals a major shift in the AI chip landscape.

stories.title: Ultrasound imaging of the brain — new AI-powered diagnostic breakthrough
stories.summary: Aleph Neuro demonstrates AI-enhanced ultrasound brain imaging that could replace expensive MRI for certain diagnostics, making brain scanning more accessible and affordable worldwide.

stories.title: The gap between open weights LLMs and closed source LLMs
stories.summary: Analysis reveals the gap between open and closed source LLMs is shrinking rapidly on coding benchmarks, but remains flat at ~5 months on average across 18 benchmarks. A frontier open-source LLM may arrive by December 2026.

stories.title: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor
stories.summary: Workweave Router enables intelligent model routing within popular AI coding tools, automatically selecting the best model for each task to optimize cost and performance.

stories.title: Google ARDS: Open standard for AI agents to interact with web resources
stories.summary: Google introduces the ARDS specification — an open standard for AI agents to discover and interact with web resources, backed by Microsoft, GitHub, NVIDIA, and Amazon. Aims to standardize the agentic AI ecosystem.

stories.title: AI in mathematics is forcing big questions about proof and discovery
stories.summary: IEEE Spectrum explores how AI systems are making genuine mathematical discoveries, forcing mathematicians to reconsider what constitutes proof and the nature of mathematical understanding.
